name: Redfin Listings
description: Fetch Redfin for-sale listings for saved searches and surface only newly-listed homes. Powers a daily 'new listings' digest you can push to yourself.

userAgent.description: Browser User-Agent string used for Redfin requests. Leave empty to use a sane default.

maxResults.description: Maximum listings to fetch per search (default 100).

searches.description: Saved searches the daily new-listings workflow runs. Get regionId/regionType from a Redfin search URL, e.g. redfin.com/city/16163/WA/Seattle => regionId 16163, regionType 6 (city).

regionId.description: Redfin region id from the search URL.

market.description: Redfin market slug, e.g. "seattle" (optional but recommended).

maxDaysOnMarket.description: Only include listings on the market <= this many days.

userAgent.label: User-Agent
userAgent.help: Optional browser UA used for Redfin requests.

searches.label: Saved Searches
searches.help: Define one entry per area/criteria. regionId + regionType come from the Redfin search URL.
